text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh, not again... What is it now?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that you, Air Groove? What has you
sighing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, Flower. To tell you the truth...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The flowers here are growing better than I'd
planned.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh wow! But, isn't that a good thing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's important to know why this is
happening. I selected specific fertilizers for each
species' growth rate. But now, this makes it
difficult to determine what amounts I should use.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I understand now. Then I suppose you'll have
to relay that information to the flower lovers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The flower lovers? I've already spoken with the
groundskeeping committee.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No, not them. Who I'm talking about may already
be here...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Is that Taishin? Why is she turning the
flowerpots?)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Too much sunlight. This one'll end up browning.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The plots aren't carved out right. I heard you
need to give each plant enough space.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I'll take one off you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good morning, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Flower. Thanks to you, I have a clearer
picture of things.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If they're so interested in visiting the flowers, they might as well be part of the committee. I'll write a recommendation letter tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Sorry, but... would it be possible to let them
be?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Flowers can... wilt if you give them too much
attention.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll make mention of it as a point of
concern and leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I have to say, you know quite a lot about
growing flowers yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just do what I can, hehe... But thank you
very much.
